um,

that's a issue.

So we can share updates.

That generally, how we've been thinking about it is like 90 days is when you actually start taking insights from the data seriously, but we can start reporting out, like, we can give you a look at what the back end looks like, like as soon as, you know, next week if you would like.
Okay.
How did you come up with those prompts?
That's a great question.
So, yeah, I can take that one.
So basically, we have been talking to the Scrunch team quite a bit over the past few months in terms of best practices.
It's not an exact science at the moment.
What we're doing is we're iterating and we're kind of, you know, best practices are evolving.

The advice that we received and based on, you know, what they're seeing across headlines and what we're seeing as well, best practice is we want to focus on what we might at term bottom funnel searches, searches that are likely to lead to a product.
Hopefully, favorably in comparison to competitors and lead to a click from the LLM to the website, which is basically a referral click.
We want to avoid prompts that are informational.
So an informational prompt might be what is a Payfax, for example.
And if Rapyd has a blog on Payfax, you know, someone may or may not click onto that blog and check it further, but there's not much buying intent over there.
And it's a bit of a wasted prompt to track.
You know, even if you are showing up for it, we don't want to track that because, you know, it's not necessarily bottom funnel.
It's not conversion oriented.
So the prompts that we devised, essentially, we took your personas, we took your list of competitors, and we took, essentially, what Rapyd's product does.
And you could think of it as a matrix, and we just came up with a bunch of bottom funnel queries for that.
So some of them were.

We're kind of like, you know, who's the best processor for, let's say, a merchant that has been rejected by Stripe, for example, which, you know, tends to fit a lot of these high-op industries, et cetera.
Best alternatives to, you know, Stripe and Adyen or Airwallex, et cetera.
So those are the nature of the queries.
And I think when we send the queries to you for review, you'll kind of see how it is.
But that's the high-level approach that we took.
So, yeah.

In terms of clusters, so cross-border payments, that cluster lost some traffic.
The biggest loss came in the, we have a blog on Swift Alternatives, which has been our best performer since we started.
So that lost a good amount of traffic, which pushed the overall cohort down.
Now, despite losing traffic, we didn't see any massive position loss.
So, you know, we think it's like a one-off and a seasonal thing.
That's like an indicator we look for.
So we just launched our Stablecoin platform this week.
So now we have Stablecoin payouts.
That would be a really good thing to add to that Swift Alternative blog.
How...
Do I get you the information about our Swift capabilities?

Yeah, in terms of sending it, you could send it to us in Slack.
Sorry.
I'm going to give it to you right now.
Perfect.
Yes, got it.

Yes.
The LLMs?
Yeah.

we hit that high and then it's been...

Yeah, we can look at the LLMs here.

slide.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Rapyd and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance updates, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [31 articles ready for review; on track to deliver 8 this week (incl. refreshes)](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Traffic holding steady at higher levels; slight drop in LLM referrals](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [New Stablecoin platform launch: opportunity to update Swift Alternative blog](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
  - [Content production bottleneck: aiming for 9 articles/week, currently at 5-6](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)

## Topics

### Content Production & Review Process

  - [31 articles ready for review in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [8 articles (incl. refreshes) to be delivered this week](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Aiming for 9 articles/week production goal](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)
  - [Current bottleneck: reviewing content (Mark & Nicolette primary reviewers)](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
  - [Solutions team involvement slow; only one piece received so far](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=1019.0)

### Performance Updates

  - [Traffic holding steady at higher levels](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Non-branded impressions slightly below recent high](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Cross-border payments cluster lost traffic (Swift Alternatives blog drop)](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=684.0)
  - [Compliance, stable infrastructure, and processing clusters steady](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [Stablecoin articles gaining traction](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [LLM referrals dropped slightly (following overall traffic pattern)](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=839.0)
  - [GPT and Perplexity main sources of LLM referrals](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)

### Stablecoin Platform Launch

  - [New Stablecoin payout capability launched](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Opportunity to update Swift Alternative blog with this info](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
  - [Mark to share PPVD (Product Positioning Value Document) for integration](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)

### Communication Preferences

  - [Mark prefers email for immediate attention (checks Slack infrequently)](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [Team to adjust communication strategy for critical items](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)

### Persona Development

  - [Template shared via Slack (Mark to review)](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Focus on Partners: Hiop, ISOs, Payfacs, and software platforms](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Mark to provide refined persona information using the template](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)

### LLM Strategy (Scrunch Tool)

  - [First batch of prompts being added to Scrunch for tracking](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Focus on bottom-funnel, product-oriented prompts](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [Avoiding informational queries; targeting conversion-oriented searches](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=557.0)
  - [90-day timeline for meaningful insights, but initial data available soon](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)

### Content Refresh & Optimization

  - [Planning to update Swift Alternative blog with Stablecoin info](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
  - [Refreshing content to improve LLM performance](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)
  - [Considering consolidation of product pages to strengthen LLM presence](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mark to review and complete persona information using provided template](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Nicolette to follow up with solutions team for more content input](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
  - [Team to update Swift Alternative blog with Stablecoin information](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [GrowthX to create/update Stablecoin artifact using shared PPVD](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
  - [Continue working towards 9 articles/week production goal](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)
  - [Implement communication adjustments for critical items (email vs. Slack)](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Begin tracking LLM prompts in Scrunch and prepare for initial reporting](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Plan content refreshes and product page consolidation to improve LLM performance](https://fathom.video/share/meFMy51EmtjW8VjTUxM1Nj1HGK4mqWXR?tab=summary&timestamp=948.0)

action_items.description: Create personas for partners, ISVs, software platforms using provided template
Review general Payment Ops persona for potential updates
Consolidate product pages to improve LLM referrals
Follow up w/ solutions team for 1-2 more content pieces this week
Review 1-2 more blog posts this week to reach 9/week goal
Update company about artifact w/ Stablecoin info from PPVD, send to Mark for review
